props.color: Background fill — a theme name (primary, success…) or any CSS color. Neutral if unset.
props.size: Pixel size (number or '70'), or a named size (x-small, small, default, large, x-large).
props.icon: A leading icon, shown when there's no image.
props.text: Initials — shown when there's no image/icon. 1–5 chars show as-is; longer text reduces to one letter per word.
props.circle: Render a full circle instead of the default rounded square.
props.badgePosition: Badge corner — top-right, top-left, bottom-left, or bottom-right (default).
props.history: Draw a colored story ring around the avatar (follows `color`).
props.writing: Show animated typing dots in the badge.
props.pointer: Use a pointer cursor, for clickable avatars.

slots.default: Avatar content when there's no image/icon/text (e.g. custom initials).
slots.badge: Custom badge content (e.g. a count); turns the dot into a pill.
slots.icons: A side panel of action icons revealed beside the avatar.
